basic_details.job_title: IIITDM Jabalpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing Jabalpur (IIITDM Jabalpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing Jabalpur (IIITDM Jabalpur) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIITDM Jabalpur. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIITDM Jabalpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech in ECE/relevant discipline OR M.Sc (Physics/Electronics) with NET/GATE or equivalent
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech in ECE/relevant discipline OR M.Sc (Physics/Electronics) with NET/GATE or equivalent

all_official_links.label: Download IIITDM Jabalpur Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to confirm participation for the IIITDM Jabalpur walk-in?
faq.answer: The last date for email confirmation to participate in the walk-in interview for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIITDM Jabalpur is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. When is the walk-in interview scheduled for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The walk-in written test and interview for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIITDM Jabalpur is scheduled to be held on 20th July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech in ECE/relevant discipline or an M.Sc (Physics/Electronics) with NET/GATE or equivalent qualification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000 per month, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIITDM Jabalpur.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIITDM Jabalpur located?
faq.answer: IIITDM Jabalpur is located in Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 482005.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contract-based position for a Junior Research Fellow.
